products.name: Jeerasal Rice (Premium Quality)
products.description: Experience the rich aroma and fine texture of Jeerasal Rice, perfect for everyday meals.

products.name: D S RIce
products.description: Premium Basmati Rice is an exotic new class of Basmati with a delectable taste that lets you relish special moments in life.

products.name: Fresh Tomato
products.description: Fresh juicy tomatoes. Farm-fresh and naturally ripened. Great for salads, curries, and sauces.

products.name: Premium Potato
products.description: Premium quality potatoes. Perfect for fries, curries, and everyday cooking.

products.name: Basmati Rice
products.description: Aged Basmati Rice - long grain, aromatic. Perfect for biryani and pulao.

products.name: Toor Dal
products.description: Premium quality toor dal (arhar dal). High protein, easy to cook.

products.name: Amul Gold Milk
products.description: Amul Gold full cream milk. Rich and creamy. Pasteurized and safe.

products.name: Fresh Curd
products.description: Fresh thick curd prepared from toned milk. Probiotic rich.

products.name: Fresh Paneer
products.description: Fresh and soft cottage cheese. Perfect for paneer butter masala and shahi paneer.

products.name: Whole Wheat Atta
products.description: Whole wheat flour (chakki atta). High fiber and protein.

products.name: White Sugar
products.description: Fine quality crystal sugar. Perfect for tea, coffee, and sweets.

products.name: Premium Tea
products.description: Premium tea leaves - rich aroma and taste. Perfect for chai lovers.

products.name: Sunflower Oil
products.description: Refined sunflower oil. Healthy cooking oil for daily use.

products.name: Iodized Salt
products.description: Iodized salt - iron fortified. Essential for daily cooking.

products.name: Red Chilli Powder
products.description: Pure red chilli powder - medium spicy. Adds color and heat to curries.

products.name: Turmeric Powder
products.description: Pure turmeric powder (haldi). Known for antiseptic properties.

products.name: Coriander Powder
products.description: Pure coriander powder (dhaniya powder). Essential for Indian curries.

products.name: Farm Fresh Eggs
products.description: Farm fresh eggs. High in protein and omega-3.

products.name: Fresh Bread
products.description: Fresh white bread. Soft and perfect for sandwiches.

products.name: Amul Butter
products.description: Amul butter - creamy and delicious. Perfect for toast and cooking.

products.name: Fresh Ginger (Adrak)
products.description: Fresh ginger root. Adds amazing flavor to tea, curries, and kadha. Known for its medicinal properties.

products.name: Green Chilli (Hari Mirch)
products.description: Fresh green chillies - hot and spicy. Essential for Indian cooking and chutneys.

products.name: Lemon (Nimbu)
products.description: Fresh juicy lemons. Perfect for lemonade, chutney, and adding freshness to meals.

products.name: Peas (Matar)
products.description: Fresh green peas. Sweet and tender. Perfect for pulao, aloo matar, and matar paneer.
